Experience

Co-Founder at Preamble • San Francisco

Aug 2014 - Current
  • Co-founded a professional networking application called Preamble. Preamble is an iOS app that allows users to network with their digital business card and follow up with anyone on our messaging platform.
  • Lead development, marketing, and growth for our iOS app and Preamble community from idea to launch.
  • Focus on product development and iterate and improve our user interface and user experience design.

iOS Developer at One Mainstream • Cupertino

Feb 2014 - Aug 2014
  • Created our iOS platform for on-demand video streaming entertainment services on iPhone and iPad devices.
  • Developed front-end web clients and RESTful APIs on Ruby on Rails.
  • Integrated Amazon Fire TV functionality and support in our Android ecosystem.

iOS Developer at Flagship • Roseville

Nov 2013 - Jan 2014
  • Led development on our iOS social networking app that allowed users to buy and sell goods in a marketplace.
  • Designed the user interface and experience for our iOS apps from initial wireframes to product release.
  • Created and collaborated on frameworks and libraries for our engineering team and open source community.

Software Engineer at Ask Ziggy • Rocklin

Feb 2013 - Nov 2013
  • Led development on our iOS app that allowed users to search and book hotels with speech recognition and natural language processing.
  • Developed and designed iOS prototypes in rapid sprint cycles for prospective business partners.
  • Collaborated with the natural language processing and data science team on front-end user interface and backend algorithmic design.

WOTD - Watch Of The Day • iOS

Feb 2015 - Current
  • Created an iOS app that allow users to customize their Apple Watch from their fashion outfit and style.
